/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/BackTester.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BackTester.dir/DataLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BackTester.dir/Strategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BackTester.dir/Portfolio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BackTester.dir/Menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BackTester.dir/Cointegration.cpp.o -o BackTester
